---
title: "Hyejung Lee"
subtitle: "Biostatistician | University of Utah"
image: img/headshot.jpg
image-alt: "Headshot of Hyejung Lee"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV (PDF)
      href: CV.pdf
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hyejung-lee-b2249819b/
    # - icon: github
    #   text: GitHub
    #   href: https://github.com/hyejung0
    # - icon: mortarboard
    #   text: Google Scholar
    #   href: https://scholar.google.com/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:hyejung.lee@utah.edu
---

I’m a biostatistician based in Utah, committed to using statistics in service of work that directly improves lives. I’m especially interested in collaborative research that helps underserved populations, from local communities to global settings.

**Current interests**

- Research that directly improves the lives of underserved populations
- Collaborative projects with clear, practical impact on care, access, or outcomes
- Mission-driven health research across disease areas, from local to global settings
- Rigorous statistical work that helps turn evidence into action

<!-- Replace the subtitle and links above with your preferred title, lab/center, and profiles. -->
